summary:
PROPHETIC VISIONS AND THE TRIBULATION: Brandon shares his spiritual encounters, including a vision of a glory cloud and a divine visitation from July 6, 2014. He forewarns of an impending, massive move of God and emphasizes that the return of Jesus is imminent. Brandon details his visions of the tribulation period, specifically highlighting the terrifying role of highly advanced, synchronized drones. These drones, capable of infrared scanning and advanced surveillance, will be deployed globally to hunt down individuals.

THE MARK OF THE BEAST AND ADVANCED TECHNOLOGY: Brandon clarifies that the mark of the beast is not merely a microchip or a grain of rice, but sophisticated technology akin to what is being developed by companies like Neuralink and figures like Elon Musk. He explains that this small, square-shaped technology will be implanted, interact directly with the brain to alter emotions, and govern all buying and selling. Furthermore, this system will communicate directly with the drone network to identify those without the mark, resulting in immediate beheading for anyone who refuses to serve the Antichrist. He also notes the physical consequences of the mark, such as severe sores and burns on the forehead.

ECONOMIC FORECAST AND WEALTH TRANSFER: Brandon predicts significant financial shifts, particularly leading into the fall of 2024. He foresees an artificial stimulation of the economy and a massive transfer of wealth driven by digital platforms and cryptocurrencies, comparing it to the dot-com boom of the 1990s involving figures like Bill Gates and Jeff Bezos. He also notes a critical period of transition around August and September, potentially linked to a major meeting of the BRICS nations, while maintaining that 2024 will generally be a prosperous year for believers before darker times arrive in 2025.

POLITICAL CLIMATE AND DEMONIC INFLUENCES: Brandon discusses the current political landscape, specifically mentioning the ongoing indictments against Donald Trump, which he claims to have prophesied. He warns that politicians cannot save America and that true salvation requires a spiritual awakening. Brandon asserts that global elites and key financial players across Europe, Asia, and South America are actively communicating with Satan and are possessed by demonic spirits. These figures are purportedly working to destroy the dollar and establish a One World Government and Beast system, contrasting them with Christian business owners like the Green family of Hobby Lobby and the founders of Chick-fil-A.

CALL TO HOLINESS AND PHYSICAL HEALING: Brandon urgently calls for strict adherence to a lifestyle of holiness to prepare for the Rapture. He specifically condemns sins such as fornication and pornography, urging believers to repent, marry, or separate. Emphasizing the power of scriptures like Psalm 91 and Psalm 23, Brandon encourages spiritual maturity over reliance on grace alone for willful sin. He concludes his message by declaring physical healing and deliverance over his audience, targeting ailments like cancer, diabetes, AIDS, cataracts, and autoimmune diseases.
rawData: [August 12, 2023]-[A mixture of things the Lord has been talking to me about]-[https://youtu.be/SCXTYJcPb7o]-[I told you it was amazing when I was in prayer, and I spent some time with the Lord two nights ago. I saw the glory cloud above my head, and it was rippling, and it was absolutely gorgeous. Whenever the Lord opened up, he gave me a glimpse of the glory. I'm telling you all, there's a mighty move about to hit this Earth—a mighty move of God, an outpouring like we've never seen before. I'm going to keep pounding this and telling you all that Jesus is coming. I see the retention of each video and how long people watch, and with the tribulation video, you're missing some of it. There's a lot of you that are clicking out, maybe because I'm rambling too long, but I need to tell you about the drones. You need to know what they're going to do in the future. The drones are a big deal. The mark of the beast is a big deal, of course. We have all heard about it; we are all anticipating what it is. But I need you to understand, back when I had this visitation on July 6, 2014, drones were hardly talked about. We could see them in the news every once in a while, but now they're using them for football games and the Super Bowl halftime shows. They're all in sync, moving together. Even at the Fourth of July event in New York, they had a massive display of the Statue of Liberty, and they were all drones. They were lit up. It's becoming mainstream. When I went to the tribulation, I saw the drones flying, and they were all in sync. You all need to know this: they're going to use the drones. They're in sync and they're able to scan, hear noise, and see in infrared. You can't hide from them. The people who were left were trying to hide from these drones. This is very important. They're going to use them, and they fly all over the world. If you're left here, you need to know that you're not going to be able to run from this. The mark of the beast, the chip inside of you, communicates to the drone, and it's able to know if you have the mark or not. If you do not have the mark and that drone scans you, it alerts the authorities to turn you in, and they chop your head off. If you do not take the mark, they ask you if you want to serve the Antichrist system or not. If you say no and you want to serve Jesus, they cut that person's head off right there immediately. I'm trying to bring highlights of what I saw whenever the Lord took me into the tribulation. He talked to me about the aliens. Jesus said, 'Right before I come back, you're going to see a lot of alien things talked about in the news.' I've talked about that, but the mark of the beast—people are like, 'Well, it's this grain of rice.' No, it's more powerful. It's the technology behind Neuralink. I'm telling you, it's not Neuralink itself, but it's the kind of technology that they're developing with Elon Musk and all that stuff. Everybody says, 'Whoa, Neuralink is the mark of the beast.' No, it's not the mark of the beast; it's the kind of technology. When they put it in you, it has a signal and it sends the signal to your brain to calm you down. You use it to buy and sell, but I saw it has a big burn mark whenever it comes on you. It has a reaction with your body. It can cause a sore on your forehead. I saw that there's so much to this chip, but it's the size of a little square. It's not a grain of rice. It's very powerful technology. The Lord showed me great things coming for 2024. The Democratic Party—and people got mad at me last time because I mentioned politics—that's the system. You've got the Republicans, the Democrats, the Independents. That's America. Whatever you are in your country, you may have your own thing. I don't study politics that much, but the Lord showed me going into the fall this year, there's going to be shifting. There's going to be some big-time change. Going into 2024, I saw them trying to pump the economy full of money, trying to stimulate it and make everything look really good. The Lord warned me 2024 will be a year that we will soar. It's going to be a good year. Not saying every aspect is always good—it's a two-sided coin. You can focus on the bad or the good, but I choose to focus on what I'm seeing prophetically. Even when things are dark, I try not to let that pull me down. I go, 'Okay, God, I know what you're showing me, but I know what you told me in your word.' Psalm 91, Psalm 23—you need to get those scriptures down inside of your heart. I said it in a previous video, and I'm going to say it again: you need to understand your covenant and who you are in Christ, because if you do not, you're in trouble. You need to get those scriptures down inside. 'The Lord is my shepherd; I shall not want.' You need to meditate on it until it gets down inside of your spirit. No weapon formed against you will prosper. Every tongue that rises against you, you need to condemn it and take captive your thoughts. Psalm 91 and Psalm 23 are very important for what's about to happen. The Lord showed me about the financial outpouring. He showed me more—that there is going to be something like the dot-com era. When Bill Clinton and Hillary were there, how the finances were really booming in the 90s, the Lord showed me that there was a transfer of wealth then. It was going to the internet in the dot-com era, like with Bill Gates and Jeff Bezos. There's going to be another wave, and I saw it being with digital platforms and cryptos. A new era is about to take place even more so. I saw on Facebook a lady said, 'Did you know they're having a big meeting with the BRICS nations from August 21st through the 24th?' The Lord already pointed out August 24th to me when I was praying. I had no idea; maybe it has to do with this BRICS thing. But something is going to shift. I hate quoting dates because when you're seeing in the spirit, you have a depth perception problem. But there's something about August and September. A shifting is about to take place. There will be a generation that does not see death, and you're that generation. I don't know how old you are—you might be in your 90s—but I'm believing that we're going to see Jesus Christ come back really soon. 2024 is going to be a good year. Now, 2025, that's a different story. I've seen some bad stuff about 2025. But we're not going to talk about 2025. That is some time away, and we have time to prepare and change things. There are things that can change. People want to argue that Trump is coming back; Trump said to forget politics and focus on getting the lost. We need to vote righteous, do what the Lord has told us to do, and pray for our leaders, but we're not going to get caught up in thinking politicians are going to save America. No, the only thing that is ever going to save America is an awakening unto God, a mighty move of the Spirit of God upon this nation and upon the Earth. That is the only thing that is going to save it. There is no Red Wave or whatever politics that is going to save anything. We need Jesus; Jesus is the one that changes things. That is what my focus is. All that news, the indictments, and everything—I told you it was coming. I warned you this was coming. The Lord told me they are going to go after Trump with indictments. I prophesied that, and guess what? It is happening right now. Everything I'm prophesying is starting to manifest. I hope you all are seeing this. I warned you they are going after him; it is going to be really bad. They are going to go all through the winter and keep trying to stack stuff on top of him, trying to throw him in jail. They are relentless and evil. These people are very, very evil, and you know why? Because they are possessed with demons. That is the truth. There is a lot of demonic activity behind these people, and you have no idea. If you want to know where the devil is involved the most, you need to follow the money because he controls the money system. You have these big players that have all the cash—not all of them, because you have some good people like the Green family that owns Hobby Lobby and the people that own Chick-fil-A. I know they have made some stupid decisions recently, but the man who is over the 'jabs'—you see him on there—I have seen him talking to a man in Europe that everyone knows about. He is old. I have seen these people; there is a man in Asia and a man in South America. These people talk directly to Satan. I will just be real with you; I have seen them. They have demonic spirits that are assigned to them. They are maneuvering and doing things in this earth to cause the Beast system and the One World Government on purpose. They are trying to destroy the dollar and bring this stuff in because they have their assignments. Just like Christians get their assignments, the devil's people get their assignments. You all need to know that there are big key players with a lot of money and influence in politics trying to ruin America. That is all I am going to say about it because I am trying to be very careful with my words here. I am trying to minister to you all, and I don't want these idiots taking down my stuff, but I am telling you in a subtle way that there are some evil key players trying to run things. You see them on the news every day. There needs to be revival; there is going to be a great shaking coming. I am not trying to spread fear; I am trying to warn you that all this is about to happen. People have no clue. You need to take this seriously and understand that we are in dark times. It is going to get darker, but the light is going to get lighter. The only way the light can get lighter is in you. You have to be the salt and the light of this Earth through Jesus Christ dwelling on the inside of you. We are right at the door of the coming of the Lord, and I hope you are being watchful of the times we are living in and being excited, having joy in your heart because the Lord Jesus Christ is about to come back and get us. I don't want to be heavy all the time, but a lot of you are clueless. You think you can live in sin and make it in the Rapture; you are in trouble. I am trying to help you, but you can get mad at me if you want. I am trying to tell you the truth because they are not telling you the truth. You have to live a lifestyle of holiness. If you are living with your boyfriend right now, you are in trouble; you are living in sin and will not make the Rapture. You either need to get married or you need to move out. You cannot live with your boyfriend in sin; that is called fornication. You need to give your heart to Jesus Christ all the way and be sold out. You cannot live in a compromising situation. If you have an addiction to pornography, you have to take steps to change. Put blocks on your computer and phone, have an accountability partner, and start steering your ship right. You cannot keep going down the wrong path and saying, 'Well, God's grace covers this.' There is a season of grace when you are a baby Christian, but as you get older, you have to grow up. If you want to walk in the glory and the fire, you have to walk in holiness. When you mess up, take communion and ask God to forgive you. God is a good God. I mess up too; I have issues, and I go to Him immediately. Run to God when you sin, don't run from Him. You don't want to miss the Rapture of the church. Jesus Christ is coming, and hell is real. If you are living in sin, you are going to hell. Turn or burn. Get right with the Lord, read your Bible, and follow it. Love speaks the truth. Everyone is always trying to sugarcoat it because they don't want to offend people, but Jesus told us that in the end, many will be offended. People are walking around in offense like crazy right now—at church, on the internet, on Facebook, and on X, not Twitter. We have to walk in love, speak the truth, and tell people what the Bible says about sin. I want to pray for you right now and believe God for your miracle. Father, whatever they are believing for right now, I speak healing over their bodies in the name of Jesus. I speak to cancers, diabetes, heart disease, and AIDS. I curse the spirit of AIDS in the name of Jesus and command it to go from their bodies. I call their blood to be clear. To any kind of sexually transmitted disease: we command you to go in the name of Jesus. Repent and stop sleeping around. Lord Jesus wants to heal your body. We call for deliverance from migraine headaches, cataracts, and eye issues. Whether the iris is detached, I command you to be healed in Jesus' name. I call arthritis in the hands to be healed and sciatic nerve pain to be gone. Father, I thank You. I speak to prostate problems right now and curse prostate cancer in Jesus' name. I just saw a colon again. I call your colon healed in Jesus' name. Colon cancer, be gone. I heard the word 'diverticulitis.' Be healed in Jesus' name. I decree the colon is whole. Constipation, go. Fibromyalgia and lupus, go in Jesus' name. I command healing and wholeness over you. But we're not going to talk about 2025. That is some time away, and we have time to prepare and change things. There are things that can change. People want to argue that Trump is coming back; Trump said to forget politics and focus on getting the lost. We need to vote righteous, do what the Lord has told us to do, and pray for our leaders, but we're not going to get caught up in thinking politicians are going to save America. No, the only thing that is ever going to save America is an awakening unto God, a mighty move of the Spirit of God upon this nation and upon the Earth. I prophesied that, and guess what? It is happening right now. Everything I'm prophesying is starting to manifest. I hope you all are seeing this. I warned you they are going after him; it is going to be really bad. They are going to go all through the winter and keep trying to stack stuff on top of him, trying to throw him in jail. They are relentless and evil. These people are very, very evil, and you know why? Because they are possessed with demons. That is the truth. There is a lot of demonic activity behind these people, and you have no idea. If you want to know where the devil is involved the most, you need to follow the money because he controls the money system.
